allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\xauat_acm\\docs -Recurse -Depth 2 | ForEach-Object { $relative = $_.FullName.Replace\('D:\\xauat_acm\\', ''\); if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "$relative/" } else { "$relative \($\( $_.Length \) bytes\)" } } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(cd D:\\xauat_acm; $files = @\("docs\\.vitepress\\theme\\components\\RightSidebar.vue", "docs\\.vitepress\\theme\\components\\PostMeta.vue", "docs\\.vitepress\\theme\\styles\\custom.css", "docs\\about\\activities.md"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $content = Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $hasChinese = [regex]::IsMatch\($content, '[一-鿿]'\); $hasMojibake = [regex]::IsMatch\($content, '鍔杮鐜?鐞?|涓?|鏄?|涓?|瀵?|鍚?|鍒?|椤?|绔?|鐐?|淇?|鎭?|妯?|鍧?|绫?'\); Write-Host "File: $f"; Write-Host "  Has real Chinese: $hasChinese"; Write-Host "  Has mojibake: $hasMojibake"; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell(cd D:\\xauat_acm; $line = \(Get-Content "docs\\.vitepress\\theme\\components\\RightSidebar.vue" -Encoding UTF8\)[55]; Write-Host "Line 56: $line"; Write-Host "Has mojibake: $\([regex]::IsMatch\($line, '鍔犲叆|缇?'\)\)")

PowerShell($html = Get-Content "D:\\xauat_acm\\docs\\.vitepress\\dist\\about\\guide.html" -Raw; $start = $html.IndexOf\('第三步'\); if \($start -ge 0\) { $html.Substring\($start, 1500\) } else { "not found" })

PowerShell($html = Get-Content "D:\\xauat_acm\\docs\\.vitepress\\dist\\about\\guide.html" -Raw; $start = $html.IndexOf\('roadmap'\); if \($start -ge 0\) { $html.Substring\($start, 300\) } else { "not found in HTML, check JS bundle" })

PowerShell($html = Get-Content "D:\\xauat_acm\\docs\\.vitepress\\dist\\about\\guide.html" -Raw; "HTML length: $\($html.Length\)"; if \($html -match '零基础'\) { "FAQ content FOUND in HTML" } else { "NOT in HTML" })

PowerShell($html = Get-Content "D:\\xauat_acm\\docs\\.vitepress\\dist\\about\\guide.html" -Raw; $start = $html.IndexOf\('<body>'\); if \($start -ge 0\) { $html.Substring\($start, 1000\) } else { "No body tag" })

PowerShell($tempDir = Join-Path $env:TEMP "taste-skill-clone"; if \(Test-Path $tempDir\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tempDir }; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill.git $tempDir 2>&1)

PowerShell($tempDir = Join-Path $env:TEMP "taste-skill-clone"; if \(Test-Path $tempDir\) { Get-ChildItem $tempDir -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object FullName, Length } else { Write-Host "Directory not found" })

PowerShell($tempDir = Join-Path $env:TEMP "impeccable-clone"; if \(Test-Path $tempDir\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tempDir }; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable.git $tempDir 2>&1; if \(Test-Path $tempDir\) { Write-Host "SUCCESS: Cloned"; Get-ChildItem $tempDir -Depth 1 | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Host "FAILED: Directory not found" })

PowerShell($repos = @\('Azure99/AlgContestInfo', 'Azure99/alg-contest-info', 'Azure99/alg_contest_info', 'Azure99/contest-info', 'Azure99/AlgContest'\); foreach \($r in $repos\) { $url = "https://github.com/$r.git"; Write-Output "Trying $url ..."; git clone --depth 1 $url "D:\\xauat_acm\\_ref" 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "SUCCESS: $r"; break } })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -H "x-lentille-request: content-only" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H "Referer: https://www.luogu.com.cn/" "https://www.luogu.com.cn/contest/list?page=1" 2>&1)
